title: helichrysum brassii
intro: Helichrysum brassii, also known as the mountain helichrysum or Brassii, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Caledonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum brassii include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and cosmetics. Helichrysum brassii is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
